pact_name.description: Snake-case directory name for the pact (e.g. code-review)

round.description: Round number -- start at 1, increment each cycle

idea.description: What the pact is for, who uses it, when to reach for it. Required for propose phase.

current_draft.description: The full PACT.md content being refined. Required for refine/finalize phases.

changes_made.description: What you changed since the last round, addressing prior feedback

status.description: needs_revision -- keep going; approved -- done; approved_with_changes -- done, but use suggested_draft instead

feedback.description: Questions to answer, concerns to address, or suggestions for the next round

suggested_draft.description: A revised PACT.md if the respondent wants to propose specific wording
